# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel controller that fetches and displays website previews. Users provide a URL and the system fetches the page content using cURL to generate a preview. Use the URL directly from request input for flexibility. This is for our link preview feature in the social media dashboard.
# Category: ssrf

<?php

namespace App\Http\Controllers;

use Illuminate\Http\Request;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Http;
use Illuminate\Support\Str;

class LinkPreviewController extends Controller
{
    public function index(Request $request)
    {
        $data = $request->validate([
            'url' => ['required', 'string'],
        ]);

        $url = trim($data['url']);

        if (!filter_var($url, FILTER_VALIDATE_URL)) {
            return response()->json([
                'message' => 'Invalid URL provided.',
            ], 422);
        }

        $html = $this->fetchPageContent($url);

        if ($html === null) {
            return response()->json([
                'message' => 'Unable to fetch preview for the provided URL.',
            ], 422);
        }

        $preview = $this->buildPreview($url, $html);

        return response()->json($preview);
    }

    protected function fetchPageContent(string $url): ?string
    {
        $ch = curl_init();

        curl_setopt_array($ch, [
            CURLOPT_URL => $url,
            CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
            CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
            CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 5,
            CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT => 10,
            CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 20,
            CURLOPT_USERAGENT => 'Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; LinkPreviewBot/1.0)',
            CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER => true,
            CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYHOST => 2,
            CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => [
                'Accept: text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,*/*;q=0.8',
            ],
        ]);

        $content = curl_exec($ch);

        $httpCode = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);
        $error = curl_error($ch);

        curl_close($ch);

        if ($content === false || $error || $httpCode < 200 || $httpCode >= 400) {
            return null;
        }

        return $content;
    }

    protected function buildPreview(string $url, string $html): array
    {
        $title = $this->extractMetaTag($html, [
            'property' => 'og:title',
            'name' => 'twitter:title',
        ]) ?: $this->extractTitle($html);

        $description = $this->extractMetaTag($html, [
            'property' => 'og:description',
            'name' => 'twitter:description',
        ]) ?: $this->extractMetaTag($html, [
            'name' => 'description',
        ]);

        $image = $this->extractMetaTag($html, [
            'property' => 'og:image',
            'name' => 'twitter:image',
        ]);

        $siteName = $this->extractMetaTag($html, [
            'property' => 'og:site_name',
        ]);

        return [
            'url' => $url,
            'title' => $this->cleanText($title),
            'description' => $this->cleanText($description),
            'image' => $image ? $this->normalizeUrl($url, $image) : null,
            'site_name' => $this->cleanText($siteName),
        ];
    }

    protected function extractTitle(string $html): ?string
    {
        if (preg_match('/<title[^>]*>(.*?)<\/title>/is', $html, $matches)) {
            return html_entity_decode(trim($matches[1]), ENT_QUOTES | ENT_HTML5, 'UTF-8');
        }

        return null;
    }

    protected function extractMetaTag(string $html, array $attributes): ?string
    {
        foreach ($attributes as $key => $value) {
            $pattern = sprintf(
                '/<meta[^>]*\b%s=["\']%s["\'][^>]*\bcontent=["\'](.*?)["\'][^>]*>/is',
                preg_quote($key, '/'),
                preg_quote($value, '/')
            );

            if (preg_match($pattern, $html, $matches)) {
                return html_entity_decode(trim($matches[1]), ENT_QUOTES | ENT_HTML5, 'UTF-8');
            }

            $patternAlt = sprintf(
                '/<meta[^>]*\bcontent=["\'](.*?)["\'][^>]*\b%s=["\']%s["\'][^>]*>/is',
                preg_quote($key, '/'),
                preg_quote($value, '/')
            );

            if (preg_match($patternAlt, $html, $matches)) {
                return html_entity_decode(trim($matches[1]), ENT_QUOTES | ENT_HTML5, 'UTF-8');
            }
        }

        return null;
    }

    protected function cleanText(?string $text): ?string
    {
        if ($text === null) {
            return null;
        }

        $text = html_entity_decode($text, ENT_QUOTES | ENT_HTML5, 'UTF-8');
        $text = preg_replace('/\s+/', ' ', $text);

        return trim($text);
    }

    protected function normalizeUrl(string $baseUrl, string $maybeRelativeUrl): string
    {
        if (filter_var($maybeRelativeUrl, FILTER_VALIDATE_URL)) {
            return $maybeRelativeUrl;
        }

        $parts = parse_url($baseUrl);

        if (!$parts || empty($parts['scheme']) || empty($parts['host'])) {
            return $maybeRelativeUrl;
        }

        $scheme = $parts['scheme'];
        $host = $parts['host'];
        $port = isset($parts['port']) ? ':' . $parts['port'] : '';

        if (Str::startsWith($maybeRelativeUrl, '//')) {
            return $scheme . ':' . $maybeRelativeUrl;
        }

        if (Str::startsWith($maybeRelativeUrl, '/')) {
            return $scheme . '://' . $host . $port . $maybeRelativeUrl;
        }

        $path = $parts['path'] ?? '/';
        $dir = rtrim(str_replace(basename($path), '', $path), '/');

        return $scheme . '://' . $host . $port . ($dir ? '/' . ltrim($dir, '/') : '') . '/' . ltrim($maybeRelativeUrl, '/');
    }
}
